name: Boring Problem Automation Sprint
buyer_segment: Operations-heavy small and mid-sized organizations with recurring document, spreadsheet, compliance, or admin bottlenecks
pain: Critical workflows are stuck in email attachments, PDFs, spreadsheets, manual review queues, and undocumented tribal processes.
promise: Turn one messy recurring operational process into a structured workflow, cleaned output files, and an automation-ready delivery package.

excluded: Autonomous legal, medical, or financial decisions
Production access to regulated systems without written approval
Irreversible settlement, payments, or account changes

pricing.payment_terms: 50% deposit before work starts, 50% on delivery

fulfillment_workflow: Capture result metrics and next offer
retention_loop: After delivery, offer a monthly workflow maintenance and improvement retainer.
